message:
feat(ftw): wire fl::ftw + fl::nftw to delegate to core (bd-ftw-3)

Sub-bead 3 of bd-ftw-epic. Replaces ~339 lines of inline
ftw_walk_dir + nftw + nftw_walk_dir + FtwInfo struct in
frankenlibc-abi/src/unistd_abi.rs with a thin shim layer (~155 lines)
delegating to frankenlibc_core::ftw::walk_tree.

Shim composition:
- AbiStat(libc::stat) wraps the syscall return; impls StatLike via
  st_mode/st_dev field reads. Manual Default uses mem::zeroed since
  libc::stat doesn't impl Default upstream.
- AbiFs is a unit-like FsOps impl wiring:
    stat()  -> sys_newfstatat(AT_FDCWD, path, .., 0)
    lstat() -> sys_newfstatat(AT_FDCWD, path, .., AT_SYMLINK_NOFOLLOW)
    read_dir() -> dirent_abi::opendir/readdir/closedir
- ftw  shim: builds &[u8], calls core walk_tree with WalkFlags::NONE,
  bridges core's visit closure to the user's 3-arg C callback
- nftw shim: same but passes user flags through (FTW_PHYS/MOUNT/
  DEPTH/CHDIR bits go straight to WalkFlags::from_bits) and builds
  the FTW info struct {base, level} for the user's 4-arg callback

Public ABI signatures unchanged. The bd-ftw2 fix (nonexistent root
→ -1 with errno set, not a no-op walk) is preserved by core's
walk_tree probe. All 6 ftw conformance tests pass:
- ftw_diff_coverage_report
- diff_ftw_nonexistent_dir, diff_nftw_nonexistent_dir
- diff_ftw_visits_same_set
- diff_nftw_depth_visits_same_set, diff_nftw_phys_visits_same_set

Closes bd-ftw-3; bd-ftw-4 will add regression tests for FTW_MOUNT,
FTW_DEPTH ordering, and DISC-FTW-001 lock-in.
